classification.reasoning: The patch introduces new operator classes (AllLikeOperator, AllNotLikeOperator) and extends existing classes (AllOperator, LikeOperators, Function) to support new 'ALL LIKE' and 'ALL NOT LIKE' operators. It involves adding new files, modifying multiple existing files with structural changes such as new methods, new operator registrations, and changes in function printing logic. The patch is not a trivial string replacement or whitespace change, but it does not represent a complete redesign or deep refactoring. The localization evidence shows all hunks were found exactly, indicating the patch applies cleanly but involves structural additions and modifications, consistent with TYPE_III complexity. The estimated token budget is moderate due to the number of files and complexity of changes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import for AllOperator among existing operator imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of AllOperator in expression analysis.

hunk_descriptions.intent: To correctly determine the operator name based on the quantifier (e.g., ANY or ALL) in addition to negation and case sensitivity.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added imports for AllLikeOperator, AllNotLikeOperator, and AllOperator alongside existing any-operator imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support new ALL variants of LIKE operators in the codebase.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of ArrayComparison to support quantifier enum usage.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable use of ArrayComparison.Quantifier for distinguishing ANY vs ALL semantics.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced new string constants for ALL_LIKE, ALL_ILIKE, ALL_NOT_LIKE, and ALL_NOT_ILIKE operators.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To define operator names for the ALL variants of LIKE and ILIKE operators.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified arrayOperatorName method to accept an ArrayComparison.Quantifier parameter and select operator name based on quantifier (ANY or ALL), negation, and case sensitivity.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To correctly resolve operator names for array LIKE operations depending on quantifier semantics (ANY vs ALL) and flags.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added registration of new scalar functions for ALL_LIKE, ALL_NOT_LIKE, ALL_ILIKE, and ALL_NOT_ILIKE with appropriate signatures and case sensitivity settings.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: LikeOperators class, static function registration block
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable the system to recognize and instantiate ALL variants of LIKE operators as scalar functions.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new AllLikeOperator class implementing the ALL variant of LIKE operator with case sensitivity support and pattern matching logic.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide an operator that matches a string against all elements of an array using LIKE semantics, supporting both case sensitive and insensitive modes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new AllNotLikeOperator class implementing the ALL variant of NOT LIKE operator with case sensitivity and negated matching logic.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide an operator that matches a string against all elements of an array ensuring none match the pattern, supporting case sensitivity.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of LikeOperators to AllOperator class.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of LikeOperators utilities within AllOperator implementations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Extended AllOperator sealed class permits clause to include AllLikeOperator and AllNotLikeOperator.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To formally include the new ALL LIKE and ALL NOT LIKE operator classes as permitted subclasses.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added ALL LIKE and ALL NOT LIKE operator names to the list of recognized operator names in AllOperator.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To register the new ALL LIKE and ALL NOT LIKE operators as valid operator names for dispatch and recognition.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified iteration logic in AllOperator to not increment matches count when rightValue is null but still mark anyNulls true; added else block for validation and matching.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: AllOperator class, method iterating over rightValues for matching
hunk_descriptions.intent: To correctly handle null elements in the array by not counting them as matches but tracking their presence, ensuring accurate ALL semantics.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Adjusted toQuery method to use getFirst() instead of get(0) when unwrapping ArrayUnnestFunction argument; removed unchecked cast annotation and simplified casting.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve safety and correctness when extracting the underlying symbol from an unnest function and to simplify type handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of AllOperator alongside existing operator imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable handling and printing of AllOperator functions.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Extended function printing logic to recognize and print AllOperator functions similarly to AnyOperator functions.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: Function class, method handling function printing (likely toString or similar)
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support proper string representation of ALL operator functions in expressions.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Fixed substring offset when extracting operator name for AnyOperator functions to use the length of the operator prefix constant instead of hardcoded value.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To make operator name extraction robust and maintainable by using constant length rather than magic number.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added printAllOperator method to format ALL operator functions with proper syntax including 'ALL(...)' wrapping and operator name extraction.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: Function class, new private method printAllOperator
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide a dedicated pretty-printing method for ALL operator functions for better readability and consistency.
